scripts.clean: node -e "const { rmSync } = require('fs'); rmSync('./dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('./docs/dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.docs:dev: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('dist/bundle', 'docs/public/demo/lib/bundle', {recursive: true, force: true})" && typedoc && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('dist/bundle', 'docs/public/demo/lib/bundle', {recursive: true, force: true})" && typedoc && vitepress build docs
scripts.check: tsc -p tsconfig.dev.json --noEmit && npm run lint && npm test
